name: Statechart

aliases.name: StateModel
aliases.type: { currentStateName : String, targetStateName : String, history : Dict String String }

values.name: empty
values.comment: An empty StateModel; this is the initial value in the model.

values.name: encode
values.comment: Encode the StateModel into a value ready to be stored in the main model.

values.name: mkCompoundState
values.comment: Make a compound state from a StateConfig
values.type: BranchStateConfig msg model -> List (Statechart msg model) -> Statechart msg model

values.name: mkState
values.comment: Make a state from a StateConfig
values.type: LeafStateConfig msg model -> Statechart msg model

values.name: mkStatechart
values.type: String -> List (Statechart msg model) -> Statechart msg model

values.name: noAction
values.comment: The identity action that does nothing

values.name: start
values.comment:
Start the statechart based on the StateModel.
TODO: the problem here is that if the starting state has no children then onEnter doesn't get run
values.type: Config msg model -> ( model, Cmd msg ) -> ( model, Cmd msg )

values.name: step
values.comment: Step through the statechart in response to an incoming message.
values.type: Config msg model -> msg -> ( model, Cmd msg ) -> ( model, Cmd msg )
